title: litobrochia pallida
intro: Litobrochia pallida is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the pale leafless daisy or pale leafless cineraria. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Litobrochia pallida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Litobrochia pallida can be found in teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
